description: activate the object
close an open container object or door to another location
connect <obj1> to <obj2>. Connections must specify specific points of contact on polarized electrical components (e.g. anode, cathode, terminal 1)
deactivate the object
disconnect the object from the other object which is connected to it
dunk <obj1> in <obj2>
eat the object if it is edible
see the state of the object
flush the object. The object should be toilet, sink, or bathtub.
focus on the object. This is the milestone action. This is available only when the task directs, the object is visible, and the agent is at the same place as the object.
Agent goes to another location. <location> cannot be object
look at the state of the object
mix the content of the object.
move <obj1> into/onto <obj2>. obj cannot be a location
open a closed container object or door to another location.
pick up the object and move it to the inventory.
pour <obj1> into <obj2>
move the object from the inventory to the location.
Execute the function of <obj1> targeting <obj2>.
do nothing and wait for one time unit to elapse
do nothing and wait for 10 time units to elapse
Declare task completion. The step is the destination of this workflow.
cool the object
fill the container object 1 with the object 2
heat the object
measure the quantity, such as temperature or time
pollinate the plant
search for the object
water the object
